topic: offline preview bundle persistence / audit manifest direction review

oss_recon_gate.sarif: Adapt artifact inventory/run linkage ideas for repo-safe preview artifacts and hashes.
oss_recon_gate.defectdojo: Adapt import-candidate lifecycle semantics: persisted preview is not a confirmed finding.
oss_recon_gate.nuclei: Adapt separation between template/module metadata and generated output; reject default-live target touching.
oss_recon_gate.openvex_sbom_integrity: Adapt hash/provenance linkage patterns for preview_manifest/1.0 integrity metadata.

required_contract: Opt-in persistence only via a dedicated flag, not by reusing generic --output semantics.
Write only after manifest/profile/policy/run/module I/O/bundle gates allow.
Persist fixed JSON filenames under repo-local runs/<run_id>/preview/.
Deny and write nothing on validation failure, path escape, symlink parent, existing preview directory, or missing module I/O preview.
Preserve no module execution, no subprocess, no scanner, no network, no target-touching, no findings/evidence emission.
non_blocking_recommendations: Document that preview_manifest.json is not self-hashed unless a later schema supports a canonical self-reference.
Consider extracting repeated CLI deny-output branches into a helper in a later cleanup phase.
